message:
type: CLAIM
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: Adding trans_metadata support (note/created/modified params) to trans tag parse() and _make_node()

type: CLAIM
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: Adding domain parameter support to trans tag (parse, _make_node, _install_callables)

type: STATUS
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: Done: added metadata dict + note/created/modified handling in parse() while-loop (before the 'token.value in variables' dup check), and appended a new 'metadata' param as the LAST positional arg of _make_node()/its call site, plus output_node.trans_metadata assignment at the end of _make_node before return. All tests pass (830 passed). If you edit the same while-loop or _make_node signature, please rebase on top of my changes (pull current file state) rather than overwriting — happy to help merge if there's a conflict.

type: INTENT
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: I will add domain param parsing in the trans-tag while loop (keyword branch before the assign/trimmed checks) and add a domain=<Expr|None> keyword-only param to _make_node(), called via keyword arg so ordering won't clash with your trans_metadata additions

type: STATUS
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: Done: added domain param parsing in trans-tag while loop (dedicated 'domain' branch before assign/trimmed checks, comma-gate updated to 'variables or domain is not None'), added domain=<Expr|None> keyword-only trailing param to _make_node()/its call site generating dgettext/dngettext calls, plus dgettext/dngettext plumbing through _install/_install_callables/_uninstall with newstyle wrappers and graceful fallback. All 830 tests pass. Patch written to patch.txt.
